idea-plugin.name: GitScribe
idea-plugin.description:
GitScribe is an IntelliJ Platform plugin that generates commit messages from staged or selected VCS changes using large language models.

It integrates with the JetBrains IDE commit workflow, reading the files or line-level diffs involved in the commit, constructing prompts, and writing the generated commit message back to the commit window.

Features

  • Generate commit messages from Git or Subversion diffs.
  • Support using only selected files and lines in the commit dialog.
  • Configure multiple LLM clients and switch between them when generating.
  • Custom prompt templates with variables like {diff}, {branch}, {locale}, {hint}, and historical commit messages.
  • Per-project configuration for prompts, output language, LLM clients, and exclusion rules.
  • Glob patterns to exclude paths you don't want to send to the model.
  • Validate API client configuration in the settings page.

Supported LLM Clients

  • Amazon Bedrock
  • Anthropic
  • Azure OpenAI
  • Claude Code CLI
  • Codex CLI
  • DeepSeek
  • Gemini Google AI
  • Gemini Vertex AI
  • GitHub Models
  • Hugging Face
  • MiniMax
  • Mistral AI
  • Ollama
  • OpenAI
  • Qianfan
  • Zhipu AI
  • SiliconFlow

Most online model clients are implemented based on langchain4j. CLI clients invoke locally installed command-line tools and use their output as commit message source.

Compatibility

  • IntelliJ Platform: 2024.2+
  • Java Toolchain: 21
  • VCS Integration: Git and Subversion

Theoretically, any JetBrains IDE that supports the IntelliJ Platform commit flow can use it, such as IntelliJ IDEA, Android Studio, PyCharm, WebStorm, GoLand, CLion, PhpStorm, DataGrip, RubyMine, Rider, and DataSpell.

Usage

  1. Open Settings > Tools > GitScribe.
  2. Add and configure an LLM client.
  3. Optional: Edit the default prompt or add your own prompt templates.
  4. Open the commit dialog.
  5. Click the GitScribe button in the commit message toolbar, or use the shortcut Ctrl + Alt + C.

If using Claude Code CLI or Codex CLI, ensure the corresponding command-line tool is installed and accessible via PATH, or manually specify the CLI path in GitScribe settings.

Links

  • GitHub Repository
  • Report Bugs or Feature Requests

action.description: 根据选中的 VCS 变更通过 AI 生成提交信息
根据选中的 VCS 变更通过 AI 生成提交信息
